name: SilentSurge
description: Autonomous ICU sepsis detection system. Monitors real-time patient vitals, lab results, and medications across 93 MIMIC-III patients. Detects beta-blocker masking via self-correction and escalates high-risk cases to physicians.

skills.name: Sepsis Risk Analysis
skills.description: Calculates sepsis risk score for a patient using vitals, labs, and medication data from MIMIC-III

skills.name: Real-Time Patient Monitoring
skills.description: Streams patient vitals tick-by-tick and triggers escalation when sepsis is suspected

skills.name: Physician Briefing Generator
skills.description: Generates clinical briefing using Groq LLaMA-3.3-70B for high-risk patients

impact: Sepsis kills 11 million people per year. 80% of deaths are preventable with early detection.
